message:
feat(runtime): integrate metrics provider with RuntimeBuilder

- Add RuntimeBuilder::metrics() method to configure a MetricsProvider
- Add metrics_provider field to RuntimeConfig with NoOpMetrics default
- Create Prometheus metrics example demonstrating OtelMetrics integration
- Add Grafana dashboard JSON template for runtime visualization

This enables runtime metrics export via OpenTelemetry to Prometheus,
OTLP, or other backends. The metrics provider is wired into config
and ready for scheduler hook integration.

[bd-ah3v]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,619 @@
+{
+  "annotations": {
+    "list": []

+  "description": "Asupersync Runtime Metrics Dashboard",
+  "editable": true,
+  "fiscalYearStartMonth": 0,
+  "graphTooltip": 0,
+  "id": null,
+  "links": [],
+  "liveNow": false,
+  "panels": [
+    {
+      "collapsed": false,

+            "showPoints": "auto",
+            "spanNulls": false,
+            "stacking": { "group": "A", "mode": "normal" },
+            "thresholdsStyle": { "mode": "off" }

+        },
+        "overrides": [
+          { "matcher": { "id": "byName", "options": "ok" }, "properties": [{ "id": "color", "value": { "fixedColor": "green", "mode": "fixed" } }] },
